zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Downes於大約1377年出生在英國英格蘭爾波特 史利格利時，他的父親William de Downes27歲，母親Alice Prestbury33歲。他於大約1394年與Agnes de Hulme在英國英格蘭爾波易頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年在英國英格蘭爾波易頓享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Downes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downs
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Downes  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Downes was born about 1377, in Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Downes, was 27 and his mother, Alice Prestbury, was 33. He married Agnes de Hulme about 1394, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1436, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Downes est né environ 1377, à Pott Shrigley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Downes, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Prestbury, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Hulme environ 1394, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1436, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Downes(이)가 대략 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 포트 슈리글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Downes(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Prestbury(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 포이턴에서 Agnes de Hulme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 포이턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Downes родился около 1377 г. в местности потт шригли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Downes было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Prestbury, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Hulme около 1394 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1436 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
